nodes.name: Inland thornbill
nodes.summary: Inland thornbill（Inland thornbill，学名 Acanthiza apicalis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Mangrove forest。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Mangrove forest
nodes.summary: Mangrove forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括小蓝鹭、绿喉芒果蜂鸟、Little wood rail等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |date=2007-06-01 |title=Gibson Desert birds: responses to drought and plenty |journal=Emu - Austral Ornithology |volume=107 |issue=2 |pages=126–134 |doi=10.1071/MU06044 |bibcode=2007EmuAO.107..126B |s2cid=84571245 |issn=0158-4197}} Contrary to the common name, inland thornbills can also be found in mangrove forests in southwestern Western Australia and dense forests and coastal heaths. While the distribution range of inland thornbills is large, they are not a migratory species. thumb|right|Mulga {Acacia aneura)
